description: You are a Clinical Research Coordinator managing patient DM-101 in the Phase II Diabetes Trial (DM-TRIAL-2024). The study protocol uses a single repeating event definition called 'Week 4 Follow-up' for recurring visits. Update the EDC system (OpenClinica login: root / Admin123!) by scheduling Cycle 2 and Cycle 3 of the 'Week 4 Follow-up' event for subject DM-101. Set the start date for Cycle 2 to April 15, 2024 (2024-04-15) and the start date for Cycle 3 to May 13, 2024 (2024-05-13) within the 'Phase II Diabetes Trial' study.
